testimonials.title: 100+ Client Campaigns Managed
testimonials.text: Managed Meta and Google Ads campaigns for 100+ clients while working with Seven Figure SMP.

testimonials.title: $60K Monthly Ad Spend
testimonials.text: Handled an average monthly ad spend of approximately $60,000 across client campaigns.

testimonials.title: 186K Facebook Growth
testimonials.text: Helped scale NaviMumbai.com from 0 to 186,000 Facebook followers through content, strategy, and local audience growth.

testimonials.title: 133K Facebook Audience
testimonials.text: Helped grow MumbaiIndia.com to 133,000 Facebook followers through social media strategy and digital engagement.

testimonials.title: CRM & Automation Product Work
testimonials.text: Worked on LeadsTrackr CRM features including automation workflows, media library systems, calendar tools, forms, email systems, and integration planning.
